ops.note: Landed in 783fe14: locateVisual type-switches on *Triage, returning Kind ItemVisual with TriageID/ItemID; pointingError emits `block "tv1" is the visual of item "i1" on triage "t1"; address the triage` (asserted verbatim in ops_test.go and rest_test.go). All daemon OptionVisual comparisons now go through Location.Visual(), and the reduce.go block.removed guard extends to ItemVisual — pinned by the new shared fixture remove-triage-item-visual-noop.json (proven to fail without the guard, passing in the Go, TS, and Swift conformance suites).
